title: Create:Mechanical Confection
description: Added various Create-styled confections with mechanical aesthetics.
body:
## Various Create-styled confections with mechanical aesthetics.

Craft cake batter blocks using dough, milk, and eggs. Shape them into specialized batters using molds, fill with ingredients, then bake in the Mechanical Oven to create Create-styled confectioneries!

All cakes can be placed for decorative consumption or sliced into portable servings using Mechanical Saws.

### Currently available varieties:

Cog Layer Cake

Electron Tube Layer Cake

Lava Tank Layer Cake

Added compatibility with Mechanical Arms, Farmer's Delight recipes, and JEI integration.

More cake types and industrial baking content coming soon!


![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24b9c159a7ac8bddfc5fb55264dad299af75ecba_0.webp)
